body.value: 少参事
少参事（しょうさんじ）

Junior Councillor (shō-sanji). On the facing right half (p162R) this rank is given only as a count — 十一員 (11 members) — and is NOT individually named; the named roster on this half-page is the 権少参事 below. The governor (知事 前田慶寧) and senior councillors (大参事 篠原勘六・権大参事 陸原儀太郎) are named on the facing half.
rank header
少参事
権少参事 本多時雨平藤原政醇・稲葉助五郎越智通安・丹羽次郎藤原履信・斯波蕃源正邦・岡島喜太郎藤原一式・中川甚六源克由・北川亥之作・不破亮三郎藤原貞順・澤邨恒三藤原武成
権少参事（ごんしょうさんじ）— 本多時雨平ほか九名の名簿

Provisional Junior Councillors (gon-shō-sanji) — the named roster of this rank: Honda Shigurehei, Inaba Sukegorō, Niwa Jirō, Shiba Shigeru, Okajima Kitarō, Nakagawa Jinroku, Kitagawa Inosaku, Fuwa Ryōzaburō, and Sawamura Tsunezō (each with a formal clan name, 藤原・源・越智). The facing right half (p162R) gives this rank's strength as 八員 (8 members) and the 少参事 above it as 十一員 (11) — those counts are summary; only the 権少参事 are individually named here. A red-ink addendum of four more names is appended below.
9-name roster
権少参事
步兵 五大隊 但一大隊銃兵三百貳拾員 士官役々 合五百十六員
歩兵（ほへい）五大隊 — 但し一大隊あたり銃兵320員、士官役々合わせて516員
Infantry — 5 battalions. The note reads: 320 riflemen per battalion (但一大隊銃兵三百二十員), with officers and staff totalling 516 (士官役々合五百十六員).
5 battalions (320 riflemen each)
步兵 五大隊
砲兵 三隊 但砲兵一隊百四十四員 士官役々 合百八十六員
砲兵（ほうへい）三隊 — 但し一隊あたり144員、士官役々合わせて186員
Artillery — 3 units. The note reads: 144 men per unit (但砲兵一隊百四十四員), with officers and staff totalling 186 (士官役々合百八十六員).
3 units (144 men each)
砲兵 三隊
此人員 但シ小隊ナルヘシ
此の人員、但し小隊なるべし
A marginal editorial note — '此人員、但シ小隊ナルヘシ' ('these personnel — read as platoon-level'), qualifying how the corps figures above should be understood.
editorial note
此人員 但小隊
藩制一覧表第八 （金澤）
藩制一覧表 第八冊（金澤藩）
Page header — Domain Survey, eighth fascicle (officials + military register), Kanazawa section. The printed page number 三百一 (301) is in the bottom margin.
Table 8 header
藩制一覧表第八
（原朱）成瀬主税・赤座甚七郎・小幡和平・不破亮三郎
（原朱＝朱書）成瀬主税・赤座甚七郎・小幡和平・不破亮三郎 — 権少参事への朱書追加

Red-ink addendum (原朱 = entered in vermilion in the original manuscript): Naruse Chikara, Akaza Jinshichirō, Obata Wahei, and Fuwa Ryōzaburō — four names appended in red to the 権少参事 (provisional junior councillor) roster. Red-ink entries in Hansei Ichiran typically mark a later correction or addition.
4 names (red-ink addendum)
（原朱）成瀬主税ほか
